subcodes.first_line: O kindred of that martyr of the plain of tribulation, martyrs in the path of Bahá, among the most near ones to the celestial court and brilliant stars [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خویشان آن شهید دشت بلا شهیدان راه بها اعظم مقربین درگاه کبریا و نجوم ساطعه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @high station of the true believer
